_publications._publicationTitle: Autism Spectrum Disorder Symptom Profile Across the RASopathies.

_contextSnippet: the overall ASD comparative severity scores (CSS) in the RASopathies show similarities to non-syndromic ASD. Thus, in two large cohorts of non-syndromic ASD, the mean CSS on the ADOS social affect and RRB were comparable
details: Overall ASD comparative severity scores in RASopathies show similarities to non-syndromic ASD cohorts with mean ADOS-SA CSS of 7.21-7.22 and ADOS-RBB CSS of 7.39-7.66 in comparison studies
